description_long: This is a large, gray military-style cargo airplane with a high-mounted, swept-back wing configuration and four prominent turbofan engines mounted under the wings. The fuselage is robust and cylindrical, tapering at the nose and tail, with a pronounced T-tail featuring a single vertical stabilizer and a high horizontal stabilizer. The cockpit is positioned at the very front of the fuselage, with multiple windows providing visibility. The landing gear appears to be a tricycle configuration, with main gear under the wings and a nose gear under the cockpit. The surface is matte gray, with subtle panel lines and minimal visible markings. The overall design suggests a heavy-lift transport aircraft, capable of carrying large cargo or personnel.
description: A large, gray military cargo airplane with four underwing turbofan engines, a high T-tail, and a robust fuselage. The cockpit is forward-mounted with multiple windows, and the wings are high and swept back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide wingspan, four underwing engines, and the forward cockpit with a prominent T-tail.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the length of the fuselage, the high-mounted swept wings, and the T-tail configuration.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the T-tail, the full span of the wings, and the engine arrangement beneath the wings.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the four engines, high wings, and the robust fuselage profile.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, swept-back wings with no visible winglets and a slight dihedral angle.
attribute_tail_design: T-tail with a single vertical stabilizer and high-mounted horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main gear units and a nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows at the front of the fuselage.
